text: Romania was characterized as the target of aggressive hybrid Russian attacks during the November 2024 election period. These included both the TikTok influence campaign and a wave of cyber-attacks — tens of thousands of SQL injection and cross-site scripting attempts from dozens of countries — against IT systems supporting the electoral process. The Constitutional Court's historic decision to annul the election was the first instance of an election cancelled primarily on grounds of social media platform interference and foreign information operations.
